content:
### S1: No Level Barriers

Given A depends on B, C depends on D
When stream resolver runs
Then B and D metadata fetches start immediately (not waiting for A and C to both complete)

### S2: Version Conflict

Given A needs lodash@^4.17.0 and B needs lodash@^4.15.0
When both resolve concurrently
Then first to resolve wins, second logs warning

### S3: Tech Platform True Cold <15s

Given 1886 packages, no cache
When jet install runs with stream resolver
Then completes in <15s
